summary: Iteration 79 - Frontend testing completed for Client 360 View enhancements. All 8 requested features verified: 1) All 8 tabs present (Overview, Holdings, Performance, Accounts, Activity, Documents, Timeline, Contact), 2) Holdings tab shows 6 asset category cards (Stocks & ETFs, Bonds & Fixed Income, Cash & Term Deposits, Managed Funds, Cryptocurrency, Property), 3) Clicking asset cards opens modal with detailed holdings list and research reports with View Full Report links, 4) Performance tab has 8 timeframe buttons (1M, 3M, 6M, 1Y, 2Y, 3Y, 5Y, 10Y), 5) Performance chart shows portfolio vs benchmark with area chart, 6) Contact tab has advisor info with Call/Video buttons, 7) Contact tab has Platform Message and Direct Email toggle with contextual info messages, 8) Contact form has Subject and Message fields with Send button.
critical_code_review_comments: Client360View.jsx correctly implements ASSET_HOLDINGS data structure for 6 asset categories with holdings and research reports
PerformanceSection component uses generatePerformanceData() to generate chart data for 8 timeframes
ContactAdvisorSection component has Platform Message and Direct Email toggle with proper state management
All interactive elements have appropriate data-testid attributes for testing
Performance chart uses Recharts AreaChart with Portfolio and Benchmark comparison
seed_data_creation: None - using MOCKED ASSET_HOLDINGS and generatePerformanceData() demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 verified Client 360 enhancements: All 8 tabs working (Overview, Holdings, Performance, Accounts, Activity, Documents, Timeline, Contact). Holdings tab shows 6 asset categories with clickable cards that open detail modals showing holdings list, cost base, P&L, and research reports with View Full Report links. Performance tab has 8 timeframe buttons and area chart showing portfolio vs benchmark. Contact tab has advisor info, Call/Video buttons, Platform Message/Direct Email toggle, and messaging form with Subject/Message fields.

holdings_tab_asset_categories.card_info: Each card shows total value, category label, and number of holdings

features: Modal opens with category title and total value
Holdings list with name, symbol, units, price
Cost Base and P&L display for stocks
Outstanding Debt for property with mortgage
Research Reports section with source, date, rating

performance_tab_timeframes.notes: Clicking different timeframes updates chart data

features: Your Advisor section with Mark Thompson
Contextual info message for Platform (encrypted, 24hr response)
Contextual info message for Email (security warning)
Footer text changes based on selected method
Button text changes based on contact method

mocked_apis.contact_form: handleSend() shows toast messages, no actual API call (MOCKED)
